basic_details.job_title: Delhi University Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Research Assistant and Field Investigator Posts
basic_details.short_information: Delhi University Project Staff Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.du.ac.in. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the Delhi University Project Staff Recruitment 2026 for Research Assistant and Field Investigator posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D./M.Phil./Post graduate in social science discipline (minimum 55%) with NET/M.Phil/Ph.D for Research Assistant; Post graduate in any social science discipline with minimum 55% for Field Investigator.
qualification.details: Research Assistant: Ph.D./M.Phil./Post graduate in social science discipline (minimum 55%) with NET/M.Phil/Ph.D Field Investigator: Post graduate in any social science discipline with minimum 55%

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/-p.m. for Research Assistant; Rs. 20,000/-p.m. for Field Investigator.

selection_process: Candidates have to appear in the Walk in Interview along with an application/CV on plain paper giving details of all educational qualifications

Email etc. and submit photocopies of relevant documents at the time of interview. Selection will be based on the performance of the candidate in the interview. Candidates will not be sent any call letters separately. Advance copy of CV may be sent to the Principal Investigator.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Delhi University Project Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview. Candidates must attend the interview on 09 June 2026. There is no separate application deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the total number of vacancies announced by Delhi University?
faq.answer: Delhi University has announced a total of 5 vacancies for the Project Staff positions, including Research Assistant and Field Investigator roles.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Research Assistant position, candidates must possess a Ph.D./M.Phil./Post graduate degree in a social science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks and NET/M.Phil/Ph.D qualification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Field Investigator post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 20,000/-p.m.

faq.question: Q5. Where will the walk-in interview for Delhi University Project Staff be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Department of Political Science, University of Delhi, North Campus, Delhi - 110007.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of relevant documents, and recent passport-size photographs to the interview venue.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Staff positions?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on the performance of the candidates in the walk-in interview. No separate call letters will be sent.

faq.question: Q9. Can I send an advance copy of my CV?
faq.answer: Yes, an advance copy of your CV may be sent to the Principal Investigator before the interview.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: These are project-based positions, meaning they are temporary and tied to the duration of the specific research project.
